# _PNR_LIBS is set by the Python wrapper at runtime, not in _env.tcl.
# Let's check the openroad.py step to see all runtime env vars it sets.
grep -n "_PNR_LIBS\|extra_env\|env_vars\|PNR_LIB\|LIB_EXTRA" \
